item.title: Fighting Mormon Purity Culture and Dress Codes Featuring Stephanie (Contraddiction) This week on RfRx, we chat with former Mormon Stephanie (Contraddiction) to explore her journey out of the LDS faith. We will discuss growing up in Mormonism and the deep

item.title: Pride is Not a Deadly Sin Featuring Dr. Kara Griffin This week we’re celebrating Pride Month with your host, Kara Griffin, and the RfRx Team! Kara will take us on a journey through their experience growing up as a non-binary person in a strict evangelical
item.description: Pride is Not a Deadly Sin Featuring Dr. Kara Griffin This week we’re celebrating Pride Month with your host, Kara Griffin, and the RfRx Team! Kara will take us on a journey through their experience growing up as a non-binary person in a strict evangelical

item.title: Religion Spotlight: Old Order Mennonites, featuring Randall Martin In this episode of RfRx, we talk with Randall Martin, a former Old-Order Mennonite who found his way out of a strict, abusive religious community after secretly accessing the internet. Thr

item.title: People from all walks of life struggle with deconstructing religious beliefs but few communities are impacted to the same degree as the 2SLGBTQIA+ community. The idea that RfR should be excluded from a pride event is a disservice to those who may need the
item.description: People from all walks of life struggle with deconstructing religious beliefs but few communities are impacted to the same degree as the 2SLGBTQIA+ community. The idea that RfR should be excluded from a pride event is a disservice to those who may need the

item.title: Hi - I'm Paige! I'm bisexual, and I'm recovering from religion. #RfRisQueer #Stjohnspride #deconstruction #pride #recoveringfrom #religioustrauma #spaceforpeople
item.description: Hi - I'm Paige! I'm bisexual, and I'm recovering from religion. #RfRisQueer #Stjohnspride #deconstruction #pride #recoveringfrom #religioustrauma #spaceforpeople

item.title: Are you part of the Queer/LGBTQIA+ community? Please share how RfR has helped you on your journey. #RfRisQueer #Stjohnspride #pride #deconstruction #recoveringfromreligion #religioustrauma #spaceforpeople #LGBTQIA
item.description: Are you part of the Queer/LGBTQIA+ community? Please share how RfR has helped you on your journey. #RfRisQueer #Stjohnspride #pride #deconstruction #recoveringfromreligion #religioustrauma #spaceforpeople #LGBTQIA

item.title: At Recovering from Religious our goal is to help anyone and everyone who is struggling with a loss of religious belief or is questioning their religious belief. For many, part of this struggle is being pushed out of their communities and even their famili
item.description: At Recovering from Religious our goal is to help anyone and everyone who is struggling with a loss of religious belief or is questioning their religious belief. For many, part of this struggle is being pushed out of their communities and even their famili

item.title: Have you struggled with religious deconstruction or questioning your faith? We would love to hear how RfR has supported you on your journey! #RfRisQueer #Stjohnspride #pride #deconstruction #recoveringfromreligion #religioustrauma #spaceforpeople #religio
item.description: Have you struggled with religious deconstruction or questioning your faith? We would love to hear how RfR has supported you on your journey! #RfRisQueer #Stjohnspride #pride #deconstruction #recoveringfromreligion #religioustrauma #spaceforpeople #religio

item.title: Today, we came out to support the 2SLGBTQIA+ community during the St. John's Pride in the Park, sharing in the celebration of love and acceptance. It was heartwarming to connect with those seeking support in their journey of recovering from religion. Reme
item.description: Today, we came out to support the 2SLGBTQIA+ community during the St. John's Pride in the Park, sharing in the celebration of love and acceptance. It was heartwarming to connect with those seeking support in their journey of recovering from religion. Reme

item.title: "This isn't what I signed up for." You shouldn't have to sit through a sermon to get the mental health care you deserve! Find a Secular Therapist close to you: https://www.seculartherapy.org/
item.description: "This isn't what I signed up for." You shouldn't have to sit through a sermon to get the mental health care you deserve! Find a Secular Therapist close to you: https://www.seculartherapy.org/
